name: About Us
description: princeofcookies.com (“we”, “our”) is a personal portfolio site and dashboard operated by an individual developer. We respect your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, why, how we use it, who can access it, and your rights under applicable laws.

name: What Data We Collect & How
description:
• Automatically Collected: IP address, user agent, page route, referrer (if present), HTTP method, and time of access.
  • Host collection: Data collected by our hosting provider, includes, but is not limited to, IP Address, user agent, and time of access. To read more on what they collect, read their Privacy Policy.
  • Authentication Cookies / Account Data: When you log in with Discord OAuth, we receive and may store your Discord user ID, username, and avatar hash, as well as session cookies used to keep you logged in for up to 12 hours. Using the dashboard is optional.

name: Purposes & Legal Basis
description:
• Security: Detect abuse, ensure service integrity
  • General Analytics: Most visited pages, user interactions, etc.
  • Operations: Run backend services and log usage
extra: Under GDPR, processing is based on legitimate interests necessary for the functioning and security of the service. Under CCPA: usage is limited to service analytics.

name: Data Retention
description: Data is retained as long as necessary for security, operations, or legal compliance, and may be deleted upon valid request as permitted by law.

name: Who Can Access Your Data
description:
• Hosting Provider: Data is stored with Novonode, which has technical access for server operations and security. See their Privacy Policy.
  • Discord: If you log in using Discord OAuth, your interaction is also subject to Discord’s own Privacy Policy.
extra: No other third parties have access to your data. We do not sell, rent, or share it externally.

name: Children's Privacy
description: This site is not intended for individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us data, contact us immediately.

name: Your Rights (GDPR / CCPA)
description: For more information on your rights under GDPR or CCPA, visit the official sources.
extra: To exercise these rights, email prince@strw.club with enough information to verify your identity.

name: Changes to This Policy
description: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. Each update will have a new effective date. Continued use of this site means you agree to the updated terms.

name: Contact & Dispute Resolution
description: For questions, requests, or complaints, contact us at prince@strw.club. If unresolved, you may contact your data protection authority (e.g., EU DPA, CCPA authority).

name: Governing Law
description: For users in the EU/EEA, we process personal data in line with GDPR. For California residents, we consider CCPA where applicable. Except where local law requires otherwise, this policy is governed by the laws of the jurisdiction where the site operator is based.
